mods.name: PEGASUS Typewriter
mods.description: A minimalist writing plugin for PEGASUS with autosave, page navigation, PDF export and DOCX export.
mods.author: Alexispher

plugins.name: Node.js V8 Engine
plugins.description: A lightweight plugin for PEGASUS that enables direct execution of JavaScript (.js) files using the system's Node.js engine.
plugins.author: Alexispher
